calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for and with Derick Lee (Executor).

Mr. Lee represented to the Court that he had no further requests and shortly after leaving returned with his Counsel asking to be heard. Mr. Lee stated that fees are not being assessed on the correct value of the property and that he believes that he is being over charged for attorney's fees. Ms. Berenson explained that she informed her Client multiple times as to how the law works, how fees are calculated, that fees are based on Probate Referee values and stated that there is nothing else she can do. The Court informed Mr. Lee that if he wants to file objections, that they would need to be in writing and that the matter could be continued to allow him the opportunity to do so. Ms. Berenson stated that she can not represent Mr. Lee because he has taken an adversarial position. The Court took a recess to allow Mr. Lee time to think about how he wanted to proceed. The matter was recalled and Mr. Lee stated that he chose to finalize the matter today. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Anne Bouliane. Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there have been problems with the petition several times. An Order to Appear will be issued to Derick Lee (Petitioner) to appear on January 25, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Mr. Lee fails to appear on that date, the matter will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.
